message:
fix(server): repair corrupted attachment screen identifiers and adapt search snippet tests

attachments.rs: Fix corrupted variable names and method calls throughout
AttachmentExplorerScreen — identifiers like `selecte..entry.clone()` and
`Som..entry.clone()` are restored to their correct forms (`selected_entry`,
`Some(entry)`, etc.). Also fixes the truncated doc comment.

search.rs: Adapt extract_snippet and extract_context_snippet_from_lines
test call sites to pass Vec<String> needles instead of QueryTerm slices,
matching the updated function signatures.

mail_ui.rs: Minor formatting cleanup — reflow long argument lists and
function calls for readability.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
